summary: GamerGrid (IGDB pivot) - full e2e testing complete. All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend renders all 8 game carousels with real IGDB posters, navbar links to /games/* work, BrowseAllPage chips/sort work, search autocomplete + /search?q= page work, and ContentModal shows title, backdrop, overview, genres, platforms[], Developer, Publisher, Metacritic + IGDB scores, Screenshots and Gameplay Trailers. Footer says 'Powered by IGDB'. Auth login (smoke) returns expected status. No critical issues found.

issues: A11y warning: DialogContent requires DialogTitle (Radix Dialog) - 2 console warnings, non-blocking

action_items: Optional a11y fix: add VisuallyHidden DialogTitle inside ContentModal/Onboarding Radix Dialogs to silence the 'DialogContent requires DialogTitle' console warning
critical_code_review_comments: game_routes.py: 30-min in-memory _response_cache is process-local; if backend has multiple workers, cache will be inconsistent (acceptable for now)
game_routes.py /upcoming uses 'hypes > 1' filter which can return small/empty results in low-hype windows; consider relaxing to total_rating_count or removing filter and sorting by hypes desc
ContentModal lazy-loads YouTube via thumbnail (not iframe until clicked) - good for perf, but the test detected 0 iframes pre-click; that's expected behavior, not a bug

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (home carousels, navbar, browse pages, search, ContentModal)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Pivot to GamerGrid (IGDB) is fully working. Backend endpoints under /api/games/* all return normalized TMDB-shaped objects. Existing tests covering FlixVault legacy features (auth, feedback, ratings, admin) still live in /app/backend/tests/test_flixvault_v2.py - they were not re-run this iteration since the request focused on game endpoints. /api/trending/whats-hot remains in TMDB-fallback territory but is unused by the FE.

features_tested.backend_games_details: PASS (developers, publishers, similar, screenshots, videos, genres all populated)
features_tested.frontend_home_loads: PASS (no white screen, GamerGrid logo, hero=GTA V, 284 images)
features_tested.frontend_8_carousels: PASS (Trending Now, Coming Soon/Upcoming, Top Rated, New Releases, PlayStation, Xbox, PC, Switch)
features_tested.frontend_browse_chips_and_sort: PASS (All Games, PlayStation, Xbox, Switch chips + Top Rated/Newest/Most Popular sort)
features_tested.frontend_search_page: PASS (/search?q=zelda shows 20 Zelda results with covers)
features_tested.frontend_content_modal: PASS (title, overview, platforms[], genres, Developer, Publisher, Metacritic 84, IGDB 9.8/10, Screenshots, Gameplay Trailers, Play Trailer button)
